title: VimFu — :v with :d — Keep Only Matches
description: Use :v/{pattern}/d to delete all non-matching lines, keeping only the lines you want.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: V with D is a powerful filter. It deletes everything except the lines you want.

steps.comment: --- Demo: filter log to errors only ---

steps.say: This log has INFO, DEBUG, and ERROR lines. Keep only the errors.
Six lines deleted. Only the two error lines remain. The file is now a filtered error log.
Colon V slash pattern slash D. Delete everything that doesn't match. Instant filter.
